signals.headline: South Korea's March 2026 inflation came in at 2
signals.raw: South Korea's March 2026 inflation came in at 2.2% year-over-year**[5], up from 2.0% in February but below the 2.4% market forecast[3]. This was driven primarily by **transportation costs rising 5% year-over-year**[6], while government fuel price caps and food vouchers limited broader price pressures[6].

signals.raw:
